title: Blueprint Market Workbench
concept: A visual blueprint marketplace is the first usable screen, with support-engineer launch routes, save destinations, saved management, and Site Manager controls arranged as adjacent workbench actions.
focus: Image-rich blueprint catalog with category, search, selected detail, run, and inspect states
Distinct launch routes for Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import
Concrete current-product flow from source selection through run, save destination, progress, saved identity, rename, delete, reset/reload, and export
flows: Browse and filter blueprint catalog, inspect selected blueprint, then run it over a temporary Playground
Start adjacent routes with route-specific inputs and constraints for PRs, GitHub connection, Blueprint URL, and .zip import
Save in this browser or save to a local directory with destination-specific copy and progress result
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with rename, delete consequence, stored identity, and site slug
Open Site Manager to adjust settings, use File browser, edit Blueprint bundle, inspect database, read logs, export to GitHub, and download .zip
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
